## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Validation

- [ ] `devtools::test()` passes
- [ ] `devtools::check()` passes
- [ ] The Shiny app starts and the affected workflow was exercised
- [ ] Documentation and NEWS are updated when behavior changes

## Statistical impact

Describe any change to model syntax, estimation, confidence intervals, fit statistics, or interpretation. Write “None” if the change is non-statistical.
